reviews.comment:
Me gusta ir a Mar del Plata de invierno. Siempre voy a tomar un café o una merienda en familia. Un poco difícil cargar combustible por la cantidad de gente. ATENCIÓN EXCELENTE

(Translated by Google)
I like going to Mar del Plata in the winter. I always go for coffee or afternoon tea with my family. It's a bit difficult to get gas because of the crowds. EXCELLENT SERVICE

reviews.comment:
Quiero destacar la excelente atención y ayuda brindada por Emiliano Gutierrez. Su  gran predisposición en todo momento, hasta que logré solucionar mi problema. Realmente estoy muy agradecido!

(Translated by Google)
I want to highlight the excellent attention and help provided by Emiliano Gutierrez. He was incredibly helpful at all times, until I was able to resolve my problem. I am truly grateful!

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención en la parte de venta de repuestos por santa fe y Brown.mal predispuestos y muy desganados para atender al público. Evidentemente debería.ser hijo del.concecionario para atender tan mal

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service at the parts department on Santa Fe and Brown. They were unhelpful and seemed completely unenthusiastic about serving customers. Clearly, they must be the dealership owner's son to provide such poor service.
